title: Implement User Authentication for Book Library
constraints: Must use only the provided `bookstore` object to store and retrieve books.
Must use the `jsonwebtoken` package to generate and verify JWTs.
Must implement token-based authentication for all authenticated endpoints.
Must validate the JWT in each request that requires authentication.

endpoints.description: Returns a list of all books.
Returns a specific book by id.
User submits their username and password to log in. Returns a JSON Web Token (JWT) upon success.
Requires authentication. Users can create new books by submitting a title and author.
